title: SplitServerList
description: Split your server list to show 2 servers per row!
body:
Split Server List is a lightweight client-side mod that redesigns the Minecraft multiplayer server list into a clean two-column layout, showing two servers per row. This makes better use of widescreen resolutions, lets you see more servers at a glance, and reduces scrolling on large lists. The mod neatly centers the server list while keeping entries readable. There are no settings to tweak and no server installation required. Just drop it into your mods folder and enjoy a smarter multiplayer screen.

![A screenshot of a Minecraft server list menu showing 2 servers per row.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cde6d0c5f80f218f679e4267a188ec3b84722725.png)
